title: 6.0 Economic Growth
description: Quiz covering Unit 6 of Grade 10 Economics: macroeconomic variables, measurement of economic growth, sources of growth, weaknesses of GDP, and the business cycle.

questions.question: Which of the following is a major macroeconomic variable according to the text?
Which of the following is a major macroeconomic goal pursued by governments?
How is economic growth defined in the short run?
options: A decrease in the unemployment rate
An increase in Real Gross Domestic Product (RGDP)
A sustained increase in per capita income
questions.correctAnswer: An increase in Real Gross Domestic Product (RGDP)

questions.question: How is economic growth defined in the long run?
options: A rise in the current account balance
A sustained increase in per capita income and associated structural changes in the economy
questions.correctAnswer: A sustained increase in per capita income and associated structural changes in the economy

questions.question: How is economic growth calculated?
options: RGDP this year minus RGDP last year divided by RGDP last year times 100%
Nominal GDP divided by the GDP deflator
questions.correctAnswer: RGDP this year minus RGDP last year divided by RGDP last year times 100%

questions.question: According to the text, when does economic growth occur?
options: When resources are recreated, reorganized and reallocated in a more efficient manner
questions.correctAnswer: When resources are recreated, reorganized and reallocated in a more efficient manner

questions.question: Why does technological improvement bring economic growth?
options: It reduces the need for natural resources
It lowers the rate of inflation
It increases productivity of factors of production
questions.correctAnswer: It increases productivity of factors of production

questions.question: Which of the following is excluded from GDP as a measure of well-being?
options: The value of activity that takes place outside markets
questions.correctAnswer: The value of activity that takes place outside markets

questions.question: According to the UN classification as of 2010, how many countries are categorized as Least Developed Countries (LDCs)?
How does the text describe the business cycle?
options: A regular and predictable pattern of economic activity
Fluctuations that follow a fixed timeline of ten years
Irregular and largely unpredictable fluctuations in economic activity
A steady upward trend in real GDP
questions.correctAnswer: Irregular and largely unpredictable fluctuations in economic activity

questions.question: What characterizes the prosperity or boom phase of the business cycle?
options: Low business confidence and minimal investment
Rising demand, rising prices, rising investment, and rising employment
questions.correctAnswer: Rising demand, rising prices, rising investment, and rising employment
